name: autonomy-loop
description: Claude Code terminals on one repo pass a git baton: composable builder / reviewer / planner / researcher roles with a deterministic floor under every LLM judgment. v0.8.0 adds a rings + provision-or-refuse security posture: a SessionStart preflight prober classifies an assurance tier (ATTESTED -> LIVENESS -> SEPARATED -> HARDENED) and refuses unattended auto-promotion below the forge-grade tier, with a read-only control plane, a sandboxed bash tool, a repo-scoped credential, and a provisioned no-bypass prod ruleset. A mechanized bite that covers brand-new code, oracle-strength gates, a money-path floor, a convergence terminator, a quarantined researcher, and an optional single-CLI mode. Rigor on by default, tuned per-project via autonomy.config.json. 0.8.1 makes roles presence-driven: launch a terminal to add its role.
